mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendation ( user_id, input_mode, input_text, product_option, is_saved, ai_blueprint, ai_explanation ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{inputMode}, #{inputText}, #{productOption}, #{isSaved}, CAST(#{aiBlueprint} AS JSON), #{aiExplanation} )

INSERT INTO recommendation_item ( rec_id, slot_key, source_type, product_id, category_id, item_name, search_query, attributes_json, temp_min, temp_max, priority, selection_stage, match_score, style_score, color_score, temp_score, scoring_details_json, reason ) VALUES ( #{recId}, #{slotKey}, #{sourceType}, #{productId}, #{categoryId}, #{itemName}, #{searchQuery}, CAST(#{attributesJson} AS JSON), #{tempMin}, #{tempMax}, #{priority}, #{selectionStage}, #{matchScore}, #{styleScore}, #{colorScore}, #{tempScore}, CAST(#{scoringDetailsJson} AS JSON), #{reason} )

INSERT INTO product ( source, external_id, category_id, name, brand, price, image_url, link ) VALUES ( #{source}, #{externalId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{brand}, #{price}, #{imageUrl}, #{link} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), brand = VALUES(brand), price = VALUES(price), image_url = VALUES(image_url), link = VALUES(link), fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, source, external_id AS externalId, category_id AS categoryId, name, brand, price, image_url AS imageUrl, link FROM product WHERE source = #{source} AND external_id = #{externalId} LIMIT 1
